$comment: ★ phase 4.7 golden snapshot — UC-PETSTORE-006 로그인 (★ ★ ★ 평문 password 비교 / BR-PETSTORE-006 / AP-PETSTORE-004 critical bug).

scenarios.name: happy path — 정확한 username/password 로 로그인
scenarios.when: AccountActionBean.signon() → AccountService.getAccount('j2ee', 'j2ee') → SQL: SELECT ... WHERE ACCOUNT.USERID = #{param1} AND SIGNON.PASSWORD = #{param2}

then.expected_response: Account 객체 반환 / session 에 account 저장 / Resolution = redirect to viewMain

behavior_likely_bug: ★ ★ ★ AP-PETSTORE-004 — 평문 password 비교 (해시 ❌) — production 차단 의무

scenarios.name: edge — 잘못된 password — Account null 반환 (no row)

then.expected_response: Account null 또는 empty result / Stripes ValidationError / signonForm 으로 redirect
